body.title: PE chain: abort on non-pending ticket
body.result: Added 'not pending'/'not found' check in pe_claim(): sets basket[error] to abort chain when cc_queue returns a non-pending status. Prevents wasted OR calls on already-done or in-progress tickets.
body.description: CLAIM node returns done/not-pending but chain continues instead of aborting. Fix: check claim response — if ticket is not pending, exit chain immediately. Prevents burning OR tokens on already-done or in-progress tickets.
